_meta.note: Only integration_ready entries whose bytes match their sha256 AND whose withheld component gates each resolve to a tagged glTF node are copied. A model that declares default_hidden geometry it cannot address is refused: the app would otherwise draw what the manifest says to hide.

assets.label: Mary Geoise, Red Port, and Bondola ascent

animation_plan.reduced_motion: freeze the summit cloud bank and Bondola at their authored rest poses

assets.anchor_warning: The local vertical cross-section is contract-driven; its irregular coastline is stylized rather than survey geometry.
assets.transport_policy: Bondola carries people. Their original ships remain at Red Port; the lift does not haul those ships over the Red Line.
assets.coastline_policy: Map and GLB silhouettes are deterministic art direction; the exact jagged Red Line coastline is not asserted as canon survey data.
